species: Spliceosome disassembly factors ILP1 and NTR1 promote miRNA biogenesis in Arabidopsis thaliana
sample_source: Homozygous genotypes of T-DNA insertion mutants obtained from ABRC were identified by genotyping.
age: 7-day-old seedlings of Col-0, ilp1-1 and ntr1-1 grown under constant white light.
strain: All the plant materials used in this study were in the Columbia (Col) background...
